config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmWarehouseOutput3, frmContainerPhieuXuat, frmThongTinPhieuXuat_TheoPYC
Nút WinForms gốc: Đóng · Chọn
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: HR_CONGTY_GET, TR_LISTMATERIAL_ONHAND, TR_MATERIAL_GETCHITIETBYKHO, TR_MATERIAL_get, TR_PHIEUNXUAT_PRINT, TR_PHIEUXUAT_GET, TR_PHIEUXUAT_INSERT2, TR_PHIEUXUAT_NEWID, TR_PHIEUXUAT_UPDATESTATUS, TR_PHIEUXUAT_GETALLBYWHS, TR_PHIEUXUAT_GETALLBYWHS2, TR_PHIEUXUAT_GETLISTBYLCP
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_dexuat_bangmau, tr_dondathang, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_lenhcapphat_head, tr_order, tr_order_replacement, tr_phieuxuat, tr_phieuyeucau, tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang_chitiet, tr_reftype, tr_site
